notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 from multiple independent sources: Presidential Decree No. 188 (Ahmed al-Sharaa) added March 18 (Syrian Revolution Anniversary, marking the 2011 Daraa uprising spark) and Dec 8 (Liberation Day) as new official holidays, while removing 4 prior-regime holidays: March 8 Revolution (1963 coup), Teacher's Day, October War Day, Martyrs' Day.
Politically sensitive/live topic — strict neutral factual register maintained throughout (decree facts only, no commentary on legitimacy), same approach as liberation-day-syria.
Explicitly distinguished the new March 18 anniversary from the OLD, now-abolished March 8 Revolution holiday — a real potential source of confusion given both fall in the same month.
Avoided citing the literal decree year (2025, currentYear-1 territory) in published copy — used 'صدر مؤخراً' instead; 2011 (the historical Daraa event) is safe and cited directly.
evacuation-day-syria not yet built — excluded from relatedSlugs to avoid related_slug_not_found.
